name: Matt McCusker
bio: Matt McCusker is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and novelist from Philadelphia, known for observational and storytelling comedy and for co-hosting Matt and Shane's Secret Podcast with Shane Gillis. He released the YouTube special The Speed of Light in 2023 and his Netflix special A Humble Offering in 2025.

timeline.ev: Releases debut special The Speed of Light on YouTube
Releases Netflix special A Humble Offering
